title: Skills discovery bundled-collision precedence lane precheck
delta_summary: adds explicit expected-collision handling for framework↔preset skill name overlaps
treats bundled overrides as deterministic precedence with debug log instead of warning
reduces false-positive collision noise while preserving user/project collision warnings

risk_signals.evidence: collision resolver behavior changes for bundled scopes
risk_signals.impact: skill selection order can drift if precedence assumptions are incorrect

decision_gate: keep_local acceptable if skill discovery/integration suites remain green with bundled override precedence
